title: Two men arrested for stock theft in the Eastern Cape
description: EASTERN CAPE NEWS - The formation of the...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"EASTERN CAPE NEWS - The formation of the District Stock Theft Task Team is beginning to show positive results in the OR Tambo District, according to the South African Police Service (SAPS).","html":"EASTERN CAPE NEWS - The formation of the District Stock Theft Task Team is beginning to show positive results in the OR Tambo District, according to the South African Police Service (SAPS)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This follows the arrest of two men for their suspected involvement in stock theft on Thursday.","html":"This follows the arrest of two men for their suspected involvement in stock theft on Thursday."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"On Thursday, at around 01:00, members from the task team operationalised intelligence information.","html":"On Thursday, at around 01:00, members from the task team operationalised intelligence information."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"A homestead in Blackhill was searched, where a 37-year-old man was found in possession of nine sheep. The suspect alleged that he exchanged his two horses for the sheep."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Police followed up on the information and were led to a homestead in Mjikelweni, where they interviewed a 21-year-old man who denied knowledge of such an exchange.","html":"Police followed up on the information and were led to a homestead in Mjikelweni, where they interviewed a 21-year-old man who denied knowledge of such an exchange."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The police found the second man in possession of an unlicensed firearm and ammunition. He was charged for being in possession of unlicensed firearm and ammunition.","html":"The police found the second man in possession of an unlicensed firearm and ammunition. He was charged for being in possession of unlicensed firearm and ammunition."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The 37-year-old man was charged for being in possession of suspected stolen property. A firearm with no serial number was confiscated and the sheep were taken to the nearest municipal pound for investigation.","html":"The 37-year-old man was charged for being in possession of suspected stolen property. A firearm with no serial number was confiscated and the sheep were taken to the nearest municipal pound for investigation."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Both suspects are due to appear in the Qumbu Magistrate's Court today, Friday 22 August."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"OR Tambo District Commissioner, Major General Norman Modishana, has applauded the task team for their excellent work in fighting stock theft in the district.","html":"OR Tambo District Commissioner, Major General Norman Modishana, has applauded the task team for their excellent work in fighting stock theft in the district."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“We urge farmers, especially in areas that are known as hotspot areas to work closely with the Task Team,\" Modishana said. – SAnews.gov.za","html":"“We urge farmers, especially in areas that are known as hotspot areas to work closely with the Task Team,\" Modishana said. – SAnews.gov.za"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Two men arrested for stock theft in the Eastern Cape
